title: Lesson 538: 友, 共に, 土曜...

items.gloss: together; jointly; at the same time; with; as ...; including; along with; both

to pick up; to adopt (e.g. a proposal); to accept; to take up (a topic, complaint, etc.); to listen to; to deal with; to feature; to take away; to confiscate; to deprive (someone) of; to revoke; to deliver (a baby); to collect (taxes)
effort; exertion; endeavour; endeavor; hard work; striving
to come off; to be removed; to disappear (of pain, a fever, etc.); to be caught; to be harvested; to be interpreted (as); to be taken (as); to be attained (of balance, etc.); to be obtainable
